CustomField.description: The field is used only for reporting purposes
CustomField.formula: IF(AND(NOT(ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'Pending Case Owner Confirmation')),NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Closed'))), IF(ISNULL(Next_Step_Datestamp__c), NOW() - CreatedDate, NOW() - Next_Step_Datestamp__c),0)
CustomField.label: AR Inactivity Age
